name: team-task-manager-pro
description: Full-stack Team Task Manager with React, Express, PostgreSQL, Prisma, JWT authentication, RBAC, dashboard, Kanban board and Railway deployment.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run prisma:generate && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client

author: Gaurav Kumar
